notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
The seed package contains mostly public/visible battle events (南疆北原联手进攻天庭不败福地战场, 方源与厉煌清夜大战) which are ordinary visible events, not hidden knowledge.

The only potentially hidden element is 凤仙太子 being a 灵缘斋 spy, but this is already stated as a relation with ambiguous visibility and no direct source pointer from the chapter text supports who knows or doesn't know this fact.
No source pointer directly supports any character's private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information that would qualify as a hidden/future-known fact.
All events described are public battlefield actions visible to participants.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package primarily describes battle movements and alliances (南疆北原联手攻天庭, 方源大战厉煌清夜, 廿二富试探大阵) but does not provide direct observed actions from which a character's motive can be cautiously inferred. Most content is tactical/combat narration without showing a character's internal motive through observable behavior. No single character has a clear observed action + direct context that supports a one-step motive inference without psychological leaps.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains collective actors '南疆诸仙' and '北原诸仙' as allied groups attacking Heavenly Court together, but no specific faction pressure (interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, or inheritance) is concretely established from the seed facts. The alliance is already acting cooperatively in the battlefield. Individual named persons (武庸, 翼浩方, 池曲由, 药皇, etc.) are listed but their personal stakes are not tied to a named collective stake beyond the general alliance. No clear faction-vs-faction pressure dynamic emerges from the seed that would warrant a pressure candidate.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
